blended.narrative: Smugglers Notch is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,860 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: light rain showers, highs of 55°F, winds around 24 mph.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
